title: What is Hypertension
content: Hypertension, also known as high blood pressure, is a chronic condition in which blood pressure in the arteries is persistently elevated. Normal is below 120/80 mmHg.

title: Supra Cardiology BP Protocol
content: Supra Cardiology targets BP < 130/80 for diabetic patients. First-line: Telmisartan 40mg. Decision by Dr. Anand, March 2026.
